name: Boca do Inferno
description: Popular, easy 1–1.2 km (round trip) trail, taking roughly 20–40 minutes. It offers stunning panoramic views of the Sete Cidades volcanic lakes and is best visited early (before 9 a.m.) to avoid crowds

name: Plantações de Chá Gorreana
description: The oldest and only industrial tea plantation in Europe. Hike through the plantation, and taste complimentary tea samples.

name: Pico de Ferro, Furnas
description: Furna's most famous viewpoint and one of the best on the island. At 570m/1,800ft above sea level, the viewpoint offers visitors a clear view of Furnas Lake and the mountains. Make sure you visit it when entering or leaving the town through the north route.
